title: Implement Token-Based Auth for Sockets
description: Implement secure re-authentication handshakes for long-lived socket connections without disconnects. Solve the 'Token Expiry' problem in stateful connections using token-based authentication.
objectives: Implement secure re-authentication handshakes for long-lived socket connections without disconnects.
Solve the 'Token Expiry' problem in stateful connections using token-based authentication.
